{"id":"bestiary-xt6m","title":"SLICE-1 (rc2): pipeline foundation — families.json + M3 vendor-strip + M4 lowercase + recoverMemberVariant sole owner","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: bestiary-c9p8
  urd: bestiary-o54x
  ratified_proposal: bestiary-z4an
---
## Specification
Establish the single ordered decomposition pipeline + consolidated data model. Shared by ParseFamilyDetailed (parse.go:1014) AND InferFamilyFromIDWithVariant (parse.go:757).

1. NEW parse/data/families.json: { family: { members:[variant,...], bare_gen_split:bool } }. Subsumes proposed family_members+family_taxonomy; extends family_overrides shape. e.g. claude:{members:[opus,sonnet,haiku],bare_gen_split:false}; qwen:{members:[max,coder,plus,turbo,flash,vl,...],bare_gen_split:true}; o:{members:[mini],bare_gen_split:true}. (bare_gen_split FLAGS finalized in SLICE-2; SLICE-1 seeds members + schema.) Member lists validated against SLICE-0 snapshot.
2. NEW parse/data/vendor_aliases.json: ONLY non-provider vendors residual (e.g. minimaxai). NOT a hand-duplicated provider list.
3. Loader: extend parseData struct (parse.go:31-45) + initParseData (parse.go:73-237) to load families.json + vendor_aliases.json. VALIDATE families.json keys AND family_aliases targets against allFamilies (families_gen.go:182-357) -> fail-fast on typo (Reviewer C IMPORTANT-2).
4. M3 vendor/namespace strip: leading <vendor>-/<vendor>/ derived from Providers() (providers_gen.go) + vendor_aliases.json residual, at pipeline head.
5. M4 case-fold: Family(strings.ToLower(...)) at the Family-field boundary (precedent canonical.go:74). Family field LOWERCASE (Plan-UAT A); DisplayName keeps pretty casing.
6. recoverMemberVariant(idTokens, family) — ONE owner consulting families.json members AND pd.suffixes; SUBSUMES inline B1 promotion (parse.go:1053-1071) AND empty-raw amputation (parse.go:819-821). Precedence: ExtractModifier strips modifiers FIRST, then member recovery.
7. Lay the ORDERED pipeline skeleton in both entrypoints with clearly-marked insertion points for ledger-remap (SLICE-3) and bare_gen_split (SLICE-2), so later slices slot in without re-architecting.

## Files Owned
- parse.go (pipeline, loader, recoverMemberVariant; REMOVE B1 1053-1071 + amputation 819-821)
- parse/data/families.json (NEW), parse/data/vendor_aliases.json (NEW)
- parse_test.go (units: M3 strip, M4 lowercase, recoverMemberVariant, loader key-validation fail-fast)

## Integration Points
OWNS IP-1 (families.json contract) + IP-2 (pipeline skeleton). Consumed by S2/S3/S5.

## Acceptance Criteria
Given a vendor/namespace-prefixed, mixed-case ID When decomposed Then family is vendor-stripped + lowercase + member-variant recovered via the single owner. Given a families.json key not in allFamilies When loaded Then fail-fast. Should never leave B1 promotion or empty-raw amputation as separate owners.

## Leaf Tasks
- SLICE-1-L1: families.json + vendor_aliases.json + loader + key-validation + parseData struct
- SLICE-1-L2: parse_test.go units (M3/M4/recoverMemberVariant/fail-fast) — RED until L3
- SLICE-1-L3: parse.go pipeline impl (M3/M4/recoverMemberVariant; remove B1+amputation; skeleton insertion points) — make L2 green","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-06-01T06:25:36Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-06-01T06:25:36Z"}

{"id":"bestiary-lmoy","title":"SLICE-4 (rc2): FIX-B resolve same-model collapse (group key + :N + selectRepresentative)","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: bestiary-c9p8
  urd: bestiary-o54x
  ratified_proposal: bestiary-z4an
  rc2_baseline: bestiary-rlj3
---
## Specification (PARALLEL track — resolve.go only, NOT parse.go)
- Extend the canonical group key (currently {family,variant,date} at resolve.go:~231-237) to ADD Version + Modifier + a PARSED :N context-window discriminator. The :N (e.g. claude-3-7-sonnet-thinking:1024 vs :128000; claude-opus-4-thinking:1024/8192/32000/32768) lives ONLY in the ID and differs in no canonical field — parse it LOCALLY from ref.ID into a typed key component (do NOT add to ModelRef unless necessary). claude-*-thinking:1024 vs :128000 MUST stay distinct.
- Pure selectRepresentative([]ModelRef) ModelRef seam at resolve.go:~276-292 (replacing the inline rep+canonical-pref logic) + DETERMINISTIC tiebreak: CanonicalProvider (family.go:17-45) else lexicographic Provider.
- Re-validate ambiguity post-fix: peasant claude-3-7-sonnet -> single representative (re-hosts informational), NOT ErrAmbiguous. -reasoner stays a DISTINCT model.
- NOTE resolve.go:430 isBareIdentifier currently rejects ':' — reconcile so :N inputs flow correctly.

## Files Owned
- resolve.go (group key, selectRepresentative, :N parsing, tiebreak)
- resolve_test.go (FIX-B units: :N distinct, peasant single-rep, deterministic tiebreak, -reasoner distinct)
- errors.go (only if ErrAmbiguous candidate shape needs adjustment)

## Integration Points
OWNS IP-4 (:N local parse). Isolated to resolve. Blocked-by SLICE-0 (uses real data for re-validation). End-to-end ambiguity verified at SLICE-6 against post-S1/S2/S3 decomposition.

## Acceptance Criteria
Given peasant claude-3-7-sonnet post-fix Then single representative NOT ErrAmbiguous. Given claude-3-7-sonnet-thinking:1024 vs :128000 Then stay DISTINCT. Given a tie Then CanonicalProvider wins else lexicographic Provider. Should never merge distinct context-window models; should never be non-deterministic.

## Leaf Tasks
- SLICE-4-L1: selectRepresentative seam + group-key type w/ Version+Modifier+:N (types/signatures)
- SLICE-4-L2: resolve_test.go FIX-B units — RED until L3
- SLICE-4-L3: resolve.go impl (group key, :N parse, selectRepresentative, tiebreak) — make L2 green","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-06-01T06:26:15Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-06-01T06:26:15Z"}

{"id":"bestiary-xt6m","title":"SLICE-1 (rc2): pipeline foundation — families.json + M3 vendor-strip + M4 lowercase + recoverMemberVariant sole owner","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: bestiary-c9p8
  urd: bestiary-o54x
  ratified_proposal: bestiary-z4an
---
## Specification
Establish the single ordered decomposition pipeline + consolidated data model. Shared by ParseFamilyDetailed (parse.go:1014) AND InferFamilyFromIDWithVariant (parse.go:757).

1. NEW parse/data/families.json: { family: { members:[variant,...], bare_gen_split:bool } }. Subsumes proposed family_members+family_taxonomy; extends family_overrides shape. e.g. claude:{members:[opus,sonnet,haiku],bare_gen_split:false}; qwen:{members:[max,coder,plus,turbo,flash,vl,...],bare_gen_split:true}; o:{members:[mini],bare_gen_split:true}. (bare_gen_split FLAGS finalized in SLICE-2; SLICE-1 seeds members + schema.) Member lists validated against SLICE-0 snapshot.
2. NEW parse/data/vendor_aliases.json: ONLY non-provider vendors residual (e.g. minimaxai). NOT a hand-duplicated provider list.
3. Loader: extend parseData struct (parse.go:31-45) + initParseData (parse.go:73-237) to load families.json + vendor_aliases.json. VALIDATE families.json keys AND family_aliases targets against allFamilies (families_gen.go:182-357) -> fail-fast on typo (Reviewer C IMPORTANT-2).
4. M3 vendor/namespace strip: leading <vendor>-/<vendor>/ derived from Providers() (providers_gen.go) + vendor_aliases.json residual, at pipeline head.
5. M4 case-fold: Family(strings.ToLower(...)) at the Family-field boundary (precedent canonical.go:74). Family field LOWERCASE (Plan-UAT A); DisplayName keeps pretty casing.
6. recoverMemberVariant(idTokens, family) — ONE owner consulting families.json members AND pd.suffixes; SUBSUMES inline B1 promotion (parse.go:1053-1071) AND empty-raw amputation (parse.go:819-821). Precedence: ExtractModifier strips modifiers FIRST, then member recovery.
7. Lay the ORDERED pipeline skeleton in both entrypoints with clearly-marked insertion points for ledger-remap (SLICE-3) and bare_gen_split (SLICE-2), so later slices slot in without re-architecting.

## Files Owned
- parse.go (pipeline, loader, recoverMemberVariant; REMOVE B1 1053-1071 + amputation 819-821)
- parse/data/families.json (NEW), parse/data/vendor_aliases.json (NEW)
- parse_test.go (units: M3 strip, M4 lowercase, recoverMemberVariant, loader key-validation fail-fast)

## Integration Points
OWNS IP-1 (families.json contract) + IP-2 (pipeline skeleton). Consumed by S2/S3/S5.

## Acceptance Criteria
Given a vendor/namespace-prefixed, mixed-case ID When decomposed Then family is vendor-stripped + lowercase + member-variant recovered via the single owner. Given a families.json key not in allFamilies When loaded Then fail-fast. Should never leave B1 promotion or empty-raw amputation as separate owners.

## Leaf Tasks
- SLICE-1-L1: families.json + vendor_aliases.json + loader + key-validation + parseData struct
- SLICE-1-L2: parse_test.go units (M3/M4/recoverMemberVariant/fail-fast) — RED until L3
- SLICE-1-L3: parse.go pipeline impl (M3/M4/recoverMemberVariant; remove B1+amputation; skeleton insertion points) — make L2 green","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"worker-s1","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-06-01T06:25:36Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-06-01T07:09:33Z"}

{"id":"bestiary-xmbo","title":"SLICE-2 (rc2): bare_gen_split closed predicate + M2 non-split test","description":"---
references:
  impl_plan: bestiary-c9p8
  urd: bestiary-o54x
  ratified_proposal: bestiary-z4an
---
## Specification
Implement the bare-generation split as a CLOSED predicate (Reviewer C/A): split <base><int> -> (base, version=int) ONLY when ALL hold:
- has-entry-in-families.json (base is a known family), AND
- base-name-not-digit-suffixed, AND
- split-form-attested-in-snapshot (SLICE-0).
Positive: qwen3->(qwen,v3), o1->(o,v1). Negative (fall out automatically): mimo/v0/r1/l3/asi1/esm2/wan2/hy3 — v0/asi1/esm2/wan2/hy3 saved by HAS-FAMILIES-ENTRY clause (no families.json entry); l3/mimo saved by digit-suffix + has-entry (CLARIFICATION-1.4). Letter-prefixed numerics m2.5/k2.5/v2.5 REMAIN variant (version_patterns precedent, unchanged).
Set bare_gen_split:true flags in families.json for the attested families (validated vs SLICE-0).

## Files Owned
- parse.go (the bare_gen_split step at the SLICE-1 insertion point)
- parse/data/families.json (bare_gen_split flags only — coordinate w/ SLICE-1 owner of schema)
- parse_test.go (M2 NON-split RED table test: mimo/v0/r1/l3/asi1/esm2/wan2/hy3 + m2.5/k2.5/v2.5; positive split units qwen3/o1)

## Integration Points
Consumes IP-1 (families.json) + IP-2 (pipeline insertion point) + IP-3 (snapshot attestation). Blocked-by SLICE-1 (same parse.go + families.json).

## Acceptance Criteria
Given qwen3-max When decomposed Then (qwen,max,3). Given mimo/v0/r1/l3/m2.5 When decomposed Then NOT split (predicate fails). Should never open-allow-list; the predicate is closed (no per-name maintenance).

## Leaf Tasks
- SLICE-2-L1: bare_gen_split flags in families.json (attested vs snapshot)
- SLICE-2-L2: M2 non-split + positive-split table tests — RED until L3
- SLICE-2-L3: parse.go closed-predicate impl — make L2 green","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dayvidpham@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-06-01T06:25:36Z","created_by":"David Huu Pham","updated_at":"2026-06-01T06:25:36Z"}
